title: Vernonanthura hintoniorum
taxonomy: Vernonanthura hintoniorum is classified within the family Asteraceae. This species belongs to the genus Vernonanthura, which is a group of flowering plants native to Mexico and Central America. The family Asteraceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as daisies or sunflowers. Within the Asteraceae family, Vernonanthura hintoniorum is further classified as part of the subfamily Vernonioideae. The exact classification and relationships of Vernonanthura hintoniorum are subject to ongoing research and refinement in the field of botany.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
